tasks.title: Advance outreach sequences
tasks.prompt: For each qualified lead in the ledger, draft or advance the outreach sequence: message, value prop tied to their numbers, call-to-action. Compliance rule: no promises of returns, no unverified claims. Queue for auditor validation before send.

tasks.title: Deal pipeline review
tasks.prompt: Review the deal pipeline: stage per lead, stall reasons, next action with date. Compute contracted vs projected revenue. Flag anything needing CEO decision.
